MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF 2148 BRODERICK ST PARTNERS SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR SEP-01-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 01 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON SEP-08-1993 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

2148 BRODERICK ST. PARTNERS DOUGLAS L. PITCHFORD, ESQ. VS. MORI AMEDI AKA AHMADINEJAD, IN PRO PER MORI, ET AL. 3:15 P.M. C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. ALL PARTIES AND COUNSEL PRESENT. NILS ROSENQUEST, PRO TEM JUDGE. JOHN LEWIS, REPORTER. CASE SETTLED BY STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT. PLTF. TO WAIVE PAST DUE RENT, DAILY DAMAGES, AND ATTORNEY FEES AND COST IF DEFENDANT MOVES BY 12:00 MIDNIGHT ON 9/30/93. NO FURTHER STAYS WILL BE GRANTED. PLTF. RETAINS SECURITY DEPOSIT OF $350.00. IF DEFT. FAILS TO VACATE BY 9/30/93 AT MIDNIGHT, PLTF TO HAVE JUDGMENT FOR POSSESSION OF 2148 BROADRICK STREET APT. #7 S. F. CA. PLUS $2,250.00 PAST DUE RENT AND $600.00 DAMAGES, ATTORNEY FEES PER SCHEDULE AND COST PER COST BILL, UPON EX-PARTE APPLICATION TO THE COURT WITH NOTICE TO THE DEFENDANT. IF DEFENDANT VACATES TIMELY, PLTF. TO DISMISS THIS ACTION WITH PREJUDICE AGAINST DEFT. MORI AMEDI AKA AHMADINEJAD, MORI.
